Spectral pickaxe

Spectral pickaxe
(Eternal)
Quality:
Type: Crafted
Slot: Tools
Value: 344
Keywords: Mining tool
Pickaxe
Spectral
Search
Keyword: 		Mining
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A strong bit of bone empowered with ectoplasm to take the form of a pickaxe. It should take out a sizeable chunk of rock with each swing.

The Spectral pickaxe item is a crafted item.

Requirement

  • At least Mining lvl. 55.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

-30% Work efficiency While doing Mining.
+12% Fine material finding While doing Mining.
+1% Double rewards While doing Mining.
+5% Double rewards While doing Mining.
While in Ghostly location.

-15% Work efficiency While doing Mining.
+12% Chest finding While doing Mining.
+1% Double action While doing Mining.
+25% Fine material finding While doing Mining.
+4% Double rewards While doing Mining.
+5% Double rewards While doing Mining.
While in Ghostly location.
+2% Chance to find 1 Ectoplasm While doing Mining.
While in Ghostly location.

+0% Work efficiency While doing Mining.
+24% Chest finding While doing Mining.
+3% Double action While doing Mining.
+37% Fine material finding While doing Mining.
+8% Double rewards While doing Mining.
+5% Double rewards While doing Mining.
While in Ghostly location.
+5% Chance to find 1 Ectoplasm While doing Mining.
While in Ghostly location.

+15% Work efficiency While doing Mining.
+36% Chest finding While doing Mining.
+5% Double action While doing Mining.
+50% Fine material finding While doing Mining.
+12% Double rewards While doing Mining.
+5% Double rewards While doing Mining.
While in Ghostly location.

While in Ghostly location.

+19% Double action While doing Mining.
+72% Fine material finding While doing Mining.
+20% Double rewards While doing Mining.
+5% Double rewards While doing Mining.
While in Ghostly location.
+20% Chance to find 1 Ectoplasm While doing Mining.
While in Ghostly location.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Craft a spectral pickaxe

You bundle bone together to form large handle and work the ectoplasm into two sharp tips that you mold onto opposing sides of one end.

Work bone and ectoplasm together to create a ghostly mining tool.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Craft a spectral pickaxe Crafting lvl. 55 Needs Advanced Cursed Workshop service or better. 3x Bones
10x Ectoplasm		 1x Spectral pickaxe
